{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TB subgraph L3["Layer 3: Pict Template Expressions"] direction TB expressions["44 built-in expressions
Data, Logic, Composition, Iteration, etc."] custom["Custom expressions
Your application-specific tags"] end subgraph L2["Layer 2: Fable MetaTemplate"] direction TB meta["Pattern registration
Template parsing orchestration"] end subgraph L1["Layer 1: Precedent"] direction TB trie["Word-trie pattern matching
Fast string scanning"] end L3 --> L2 L2 --> L1 style L3 fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ab47bc,color:#333 style L2 fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style L1 fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#ef5350,color:#333 style expressions fill:#fff,stroke:#ce93d8,color:#333 style custom fill:#fff,stroke:#ce93d8,color:#333 style meta fill:#fff,stroke:#ffcc80,color:#333 style trie fill:#fff,stroke:#ef9a9a,color:#333 ","style":"notebook"}
